title: russelia teres
intro: Russelia teres, also known as the coral plant or Mexican fleabane, is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Russelia teres are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Russelia teres can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal uses.
